messages.content:
State the location where the vulnerability occurs in the code.

A NULL pointer dereference in AcseConnection_parseMessage at src/mms/iso_acse/acse.c of libiec61850 v1.5.0 can lead to a segmentation fault or application crash.
The vulnerability is found in the AcseConnection_parseMessage function within the iso_acse directory of the libiec61850 library, specifically in the file acse.c.
